case_title: HAYES VALLEY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. MICHELLE WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MICHELLE DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
